title: roystonea altissima
intro: Roystonea altissima, also known as the Palm of the Virgin Islands, is a species of palm tree native to the Caribbean. The leaves and sap of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and sap of Roystonea altissima can be used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, although its usage and effectiveness may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual needs.
